title: erodium cicutarium proles provinciale
intro: Erodium cicutarium proles provinciale, also known as the redstem filaree, is a species of flowering plant in the geranium family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to provide health benefits such as relieving symptoms of digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and aiding in the treatment of fever. Erodium cicutarium proles provinciale can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its roots and leaves are often used in traditional remedies.
